Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadiosAttractZo: Enable New Music Radios To Attract Zombies
Enabling this will increase the possibility of zombies being attracted to New Music Radio music. (Does not affect vanilla radio attraction.)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRTerminalEjectsM: Enable The New Music Radio Station Terminal To Eject Additional Music
Enabling this will allow the west station terminal to eject additional media. (Amounts based on filled amount settings)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRMusicTerminalFi: How Much Music Spawns In The New Music Radio Station Terminals
How much music media spawns in the station terminals.
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadioWeatherBro: Enable New Music Radio Stations Weather Broadcasts
Enabling this will add weather broadcasting on the hour.
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadioSongAnnoun: Enable New Music Radio Stations Song Announcements
Enabling this will add song announcements when new songs start.
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadioHordeNight: Enable New Music Radio Stations Horde Night Announcements
Enabling this will add warning announcements when Horde Night starts. (Only if the Horde Night mod is enabled)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadioMoods: Enable New Music Radio Mood Bonuses
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRRadioMoods_tool: Enabling this will give the player a bonus to happiness and boredom when music is played nearby.
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRChannel1_toolti: The frequency for the 1st New Music Radio station. (Default 93FM = 93000)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRChannel2_toolti: The frequency for the 2nd New Music Radio station. (Default 93.2FM = 93200)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRChannel3_toolti: The frequency for the 3rd New Music Radio station. (Default 93.4FM = 93400)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRChannel4_toolti: The frequency for the 4th New Music Radio station. (Default 93.6FM = 93600)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRChannel5_toolti: The frequency for the 5th New Music Radio station. (Default 93.8FM = 93800)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_ActivateNMRMTV_too: Enabling this will allow the creation of the New Music MTV channel. (Optional as it can interfere with some other TV Channel mods.)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRMTV_tooltip: The channel for the New Music MTV Station. (Default: 212)
Sandbox_NewMusicRadio_NMRAllowSkipOnServ: Enabling this will allow players to skip a song on the radio by clicking the tune in button like in single player. (not suggested in case of players spamming the server, admins can already do this)
